EXP_METADATA.experimental_design: factorial split-plot design with tillage assigned to the main plots and cropping systems to the sub-plots
EXP_METADATA.experimental_factor_comb: two-tillage practices with maize monoculture, soybean (Glycine max L.) monoculture, maize-soybean rotation, soybeanmaize rotation, and maize-soybean intercropping at Bako
